examples.chinese: 阿拉伯语要从右往左读。

examples.pinyin: jiē dào liǎng biān yǒu xǔ duō shāng diàn。

examples.pinyin: jiē dào jǐ mǎn le gòu wù de rén。

examples.pinyin: liǎng tiáo jiē dào hù xiāng píng xíng。

examples.pinyin: guó jì fù nǚ jié kuài lè！

examples.pinyin: hái zi men ài wàn shèng jié。

examples.pinyin: qǐng bù yào kāi qiāng！

examples.pinyin: zǎo shàng sì diǎn zhōng kāi shǐ xià yǔ。

examples.pinyin: zǒng huì zài jiǔ diǎn zhěng kāi shǐ le。

examples.pinyin: měi gè guó jiā， wú lùn pín fù， dōu yǒu qí zhǎng， dōu yǒu qí duǎn。
examples.english: Every nation, rich or poor, has its strengths and weaknesses.

examples.chinese: 阿尔及利亚仍国境贫困。
examples.pinyin: ā ěr jí lì yà réng guó jìng pín kùn。
examples.english: Algeria is still poor.

examples.chinese: 他怎么在这样的贫困中谋生？
examples.pinyin: tā zěn me zài zhè yàng de pín kùn zhōng móu shēng？
examples.english: How did he make his living in such poverty?

examples.chinese: 谢谢你在我贫困潦倒之时借给我$500。
examples.pinyin: xiè xiè nǐ zài wǒ pín kùn lǎo dào zhī shí jiè gěi wǒ $ 5 0 0。
examples.english: Thank you very much for lending me $500 when I was having difficulty making ends meet.

examples.chinese: 汤姆不知道贫穷的感受。
examples.pinyin: tāng mǔ bù zhī dào pín qióng de gǎn shòu。
examples.english: Tom doesn't know what it's like to be poor.

examples.chinese: 黑麦被称为贫穷的谷物。
examples.pinyin: hēi mài bèi chēng wèi pín qióng de gǔ wù。
examples.english: Rye was called the grain of poverty.

examples.chinese: 我受够了你的反科学贫穷。
examples.pinyin: wǒ shòu gòu le nǐ de fǎn kē xué pín qióng。
examples.english: I've had enough of your anti-science poverty.

examples.chinese: 那么你频道换掉也行啊。
examples.pinyin: nà me nǐ pín dào huàn diào yě xíng a。
examples.english: Can't you just switch channels?

examples.chinese: 最近频繁的地震让我们很焦虑。
examples.pinyin: zuì jìn pín fán de de zhèn ràng wǒ men hěn jiāo lǜ。
examples.english: The recent frequency of earthquakes makes us nervous.

examples.pinyin: zhè shì huán bǎo xíng chǎn pǐn。
examples.english: This product is environmentally friendly.

examples.pinyin: shuí mǎi zhè zhǒng yì shù pǐn？
examples.english: Who buys this type of art?

examples.chinese: 在上海一家酒吧开始售我最喜欢的啤酒，所以我趁这个机会好好品尝。
examples.pinyin: zài shàng hǎi yī jiā jiǔ bā kāi shǐ shòu wǒ zuì xǐ huān de pí jiǔ， suǒ yǐ wǒ chèn zhè gè jī huì hǎo hǎo pǐn cháng。
examples.english: A bar in Shanghai started selling my favorite beer, so I'll take the opportunity to taste some.

examples.chinese: 我想要備受好評的可靠品牌。
examples.pinyin: wǒ xiǎng yào bèi shòu hǎo píng de kě kào pǐn pái。
examples.english: I want a reliable brand that has good reviews.

examples.pinyin: zuì jìn zhè gè pǐn pái tuī chū le yī xì liè xiàn liàng bǎn nèi yī。
examples.english: Recently, this brand launched a series of limited edition underwear.

examples.chinese: 我對我最愛的品牌最新推出的機型很感興趣。
examples.pinyin: wǒ duì wǒ zuì ài de pǐn pái zuì xīn tuī chū de jī xíng hěn gǎn xìng qù。

examples.pinyin: wǒ zhī dào tāng mǔ huì chéng wèi yī wèi yōu xiù de lán qiú jiào liàn。 zhè jiù shì wèi shén me wǒ pìn yòng le tā。

examples.chinese: 我们队是这次乒乓球比赛得标的热门队。

examples.chinese: 中国乒乓球队进行了一个月的封闭式冬训。
examples.pinyin: zhōng guó pīng pāng qiú duì jìn xíng le yī gè yuè de fēng bì shì dōng xùn。
examples.english: The China National Table Tennis Team had a month's closed training in winter.

examples.pinyin: shū jià hé zhuō zi qí píng。
examples.english: The bookcase is level with the table.

examples.pinyin: tiě lù yǔ gōng lù píng xíng。
examples.english: The railroad is parallel to the road.

examples.pinyin: píng rǎng shì běi hán chéng shì。
examples.english: Pyongyang is a city in North Korea.

examples.chinese: 他們昨天平安抵達這裡。
examples.pinyin: tā men zuó tiān píng ān dǐ dá zhè lǐ。
examples.english: They arrived here safely yesterday.

examples.pinyin: yuàn nǐ men píng ān！
examples.english: And upon you be peace!

examples.chinese: 儿子平安无事回家时,她高兴极了.
examples.pinyin: ér zi píng ān wú shì huí jiā shí, tā gāo xìng jí le.
examples.english: She was very pleased when her son returned home safe and sound.

examples.pinyin: wǒ men bǐ píng cháng zǒu dé gèng kuài。
examples.english: We walked more quickly than usual.

examples.pinyin: tā bǐ píng cháng zǎo yī diǎn dào dá。

examples.pinyin: zhōu mò tā píng cháng bù zài jiā。
examples.english: He often stays away from home on the weekend.

examples.pinyin: dà gài sān píng fāng yīng lǐ。

examples.pinyin: wǒ suǒ xiǎng yào de shì yī diǎn píng hé hé ān jìng。

examples.chinese: 遠離宫殿的北方及南方是平民、商人、工藝師傅和工人。

examples.english: Finally, the discord between them came to an end.

examples.pinyin: bào fēng yǔ píng xī xià lái le。

examples.pinyin: ràng dú zhě qù píng pàn。

examples.pinyin: qǐng bǎ zhè gè píng zi zhuāng mǎn shuǐ。

examples.pinyin: tā wú fǎ dǎ kāi zhè gè píng zi。

examples.pinyin: shǐ yòng qián yáo dòng yī xià píng zi。

examples.pinyin: xīn jiā pō shì chéng bāng。

examples.pinyin: tā pò bù jí dài de xiǎng yào zhī dào jié guǒ。

examples.pinyin: tā pò bù jí dài de xiǎng shì yī xià tā de xīn chōng làng bǎn。

examples.pinyin: děng dào zhōu wéi zhī yǒu tā yī gè rén de shí hòu， tā pò bù jí dài de dǎ kāi le nà fēng xìn。
examples.english: The moment she was alone, she opened the letter.

examples.pinyin: zhèng zhì pò hài kāi shǐ le。
